name: Rookie Rush
description: A breakout prospect has collectors scrambling for rookie cards.
announcement_text: Buzz is building around a breakout rookie — collectors are taking notice.
active_text: Rookie cards are in high demand! Prices are climbing.

name: Championship Fever
description: The big game is approaching and fans want star player memorabilia.
announcement_text: Championship weekend is approaching — expect a surge in memorabilia demand.
active_text: Championship fever! Star player items are commanding premium prices.

name: Wax Pack Nostalgia Wave
description: Viral pack-opening videos have sealed product flying off shelves.
announcement_text: Pack-opening videos are trending online. Sealed product interest is picking up.
active_text: Sealed packs and boxes are selling fast — nostalgia is in the air!

name: Market Correction
description: The collectibles market is cooling off as speculators pull back.
announcement_text: Analysts are predicting a cooldown in the collectibles market.
active_text: Market correction underway — prices are dropping across the board.

name: Hall of Fame Induction
description: A beloved player is being inducted. HOF and vintage items are surging.
announcement_text: Hall of Fame induction ceremony announced — vintage card interest rising.
active_text: Hall of Fame weekend! Legendary player items are at peak demand!

name: Doping Scandal
description: A star player caught in a scandal. Their memorabilia is plummeting.
active_text: Scandal rocks the sports world — star player memorabilia is tanking!

name: Vintage Craze
description: Collectors pivot to vintage cards. Classic era is king.
announcement_text: Collectors are buzzing about classic-era cards. A vintage trend may be forming.
active_text: Vintage is king! Classic-era cards are commanding strong premiums.

name: Jersey Retirement Ceremony
description: A franchise icon is having their number retired. Jersey demand spikes.
announcement_text: A jersey retirement ceremony has been announced — expect a run on apparel.
active_text: Jersey retirement day! Memorabilia demand is through the roof!

name: Card Show Weekend
description: A major card show brings dealers and collectors. Everything moves faster.
announcement_text: A card show is coming to the convention center this weekend!
active_text: Card show weekend! Foot traffic is up and cards are moving.

name: Big Game Victory
description: The home team just won a major game. Memorabilia and autograph demand surges.
active_text: The home team won big! Memorabilia and autograph demand is surging!

name: Offseason Doldrums
description: Between seasons, casual fans lose interest. Foot traffic is down.
announcement_text: The offseason lull is setting in — expect slower foot traffic.
active_text: Offseason doldrums. Only the dedicated collectors are browsing.
